TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hanbizan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 87 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 64%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hanbizan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hanbizan hya' ga Kalibuan. tay mkyahu' na Hanbizan hya' ga Valana. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħanβizan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa kaliβuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa *alana. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hanbizan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 87 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 64%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hanbizan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hanbizan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hanbizan hya' ga Kalibuan. tay mkyahu' na Hanbizan hya' ga Valana. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħanβizan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa kaliβuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħanβizan ħjaʔ ɣa *alana. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
